summary: Completed comprehensive testing of auth form improvements - dark inputs, fixed back button, header button cleanup, and rounded corners implementation
passed_tests: Landing page loads correctly with proper header buttons (Log in + Get Started)
Client Auth page loads with dark inputs (bg-white/5, border-white/10, text-white)
Builder Auth page loads with dark inputs and purple theme
Back button fixed position at top of both auth pages
Sign In/Register tabs work correctly on both pages
Form inputs accept text correctly and are readable
Demo buttons present and functional on both auth pages
Header shows unique buttons without duplication
Hero section 'Start Your Project' button works correctly
